sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْخَطُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ هَنْدَسَةً رُوحَانِيَّةً بَاهِرَةً ظَهَرَتْ لِلْعَيْنِ بِآلَةٍ جِسْمَانِيَّةٍ بَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija se smatra veličanstvenom duhovnom geometrijom manifestovanom za oko putem jednostavnog fizičkog alata.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is considered a magnificent spiritual geometry manifested to the eye through a simple physical instrument.

sentences.arabic: فَلَمْ يَكُنْ هَذَا الْفَنُّ يَوْمًا مُجَرَّدَ وَسِيلَةٍ تَقْلِيدِيَّةٍ لِتَدْوِينِ النُّصُوصِ وَالْمَخْطُوطَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova umjetnost nikada nije bila puko tradicionalno sredstvo za bilježenje tekstova i rukopisa.
sentences.translationEn: This art was never merely a traditional means for recording texts and manuscripts.

sentences.arabic: بَلِ اِرْتَقَى لِيَكُونَ فَنًّا تَجْرِيدِيًّا خَالِصًا يَعْكِسُ جَمَالَ الْأَبَدِيَّةِ وَجَلَالَهَا.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, uzdigla se do nivoa čiste apstraktne umjetnosti koja odražava ljepotu i veličanstvenost vječnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it ascended to become a pure abstract art reflecting the beauty and majesty of eternity.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَمَايُلَ الْأَلِفِ وَرَشَاقَةَ النُّونِ فِي خَطِّ "الثُّلُثِ" يُجَسِّدَانِ تَرَاقُصَ الْوُجُودِ الْكَوْنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Njihanje slova Alif i gipkost slova Nun u 'Thuluth' stilu utjelovljuju ples kosmičkog postojanja.
sentences.translationEn: The swaying of the 'Alif' and the grace of the 'Nun' in the Thuluth script embody the dance of cosmic existence.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّنَاغُمُ الْبَصَرِيُّ يَخْلُقُ حَالَةً مِنَ الدَّهْشَةِ الَّتِي تَسْلِبُ الْأَلْبَابَ وَالْعُقُولَ.
sentences.translation: Ova vizuelna harmonija stvara stanje zadivljenosti koje osvaja umove i srca.
sentences.translationEn: This visual harmony creates a state of wonder that captivates minds and hearts.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ اِسْتَحَالَ الْحَرْفُ الْعَرَبِيُّ فِي يَدِ الْخَطَّاطِ الْمُلْهَمِ إِلَى كَائِنٍ حَيٍّ يَنْبِضُ بِالْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapsko slovo se u ruci nadahnutog kaligrafa pretvorilo u živo biće koje pulsira životom.
sentences.translationEn: In the hand of an inspired calligrapher, the Arabic letter has transformed into a living being pulsing with life.

sentences.arabic: يَمُدُّ جُذُورَهُ فِي أَعْمَاقِ التَّارِيخِ السَّحِيقِ وَيُحَلِّقُ فِي فَضَاءَاتِ الْحَدَاثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ono pruža svoje korijene u dubine drevne historije, dok krilima uzlijeće u prostore savremene kreativnosti.
sentences.translationEn: It extends its roots into the depths of ancient history while soaring with its wings into the spaces of contemporary creativity.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ تَمَيَّزَ الْخَطُّ الْكُوفِيُّ بِصَرَامَةٍ هَنْدَسِيَّةٍ تُوحِي بِالْهَيْبَةِ وَالْوَقَارِ الشَّدِيدَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Kufsko pismo se odlikuje geometrijskom strogošću koja ulijeva strahopoštovanje i izuzetno dostojanstvo.
sentences.translationEn: Kufic script is distinguished by a geometric rigor that inspires awe and profound dignity, while Naskh script flows with a unique smoothness that mimics the calm and tranquility of the human soul.

sentences.arabic: بَيْنَمَا اِنْسَابَ خَطُّ "النَّسْخِ" بِسَلَاسَةٍ فَرِيدَةٍ تُحَاكِي هُدُوءَ النَّفْسِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, 'Naskh' pismo teče jedinstvenom glatkoćom koja oponaša mir i spokoj ljudske duše.
sentences.translationEn: This authentic art requires not only manual skill but also absolute mental clarity.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا الْفَنَّ الْأَصِيلَ لَا يَتَطَلَّبُ مَهَارَةً يَدَوِيَّةً فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يَسْتَوْجِبُ صَفَاءً ذِهْنِيًّا مُطْلَقًا.
sentences.translation: Ova autentična umjetnost ne zahtijeva samo ručnu vještinu, već iziskuje apsolutnu mentalnu bistrinu.
sentences.translationEn: The calligrapher needs a spiritual discipline that enables him to pour his soul into his ink.

sentences.arabic: فَالْخَطَّاطُ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى رِيَاضَةٍ رُوحِيَّةٍ تُمَكِّنُهُ مِنْ صَبِّ رُوحِهِ فِي مِدَادِهِ.
sentences.translation: Kaligrafu je potrebna duhovna vježba koja mu omogućava da izlije svoju dušu u mastilo.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the calligraphic piece has become a true 'Miraj' (ascension) for the soul toward the kingdom of beauty, where external form unites with internal meaning in a stunning organic unity.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ، أَصْبَحَتِ اللَّوْحَةُ الْخَطِّيَّةُ مِعْرَاجًا حَقِيقِيًّا لِلرُّوحِ نَحْوَ مَلَكُوتِ الْجَمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Time je kaligrafska slika postala istinski miradž (uzdižuće putovanje) duše prema carstvu ljepote.
sentences.translationEn: Preserving this artistic heritage is a safeguarding of the values that shaped the civilization.

sentences.arabic: تَتَّحِدُ فِيهَا الشَّكْلِيَّةُ الْخَارِجِيَّةُ بِالْمَعْنَى الْبَاطِنِيِّ فِي وِحْدَةٍ عُضْوِيَّةٍ مَذْهِلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: U njoj se vanjska forma sjedinjuje s unutarnjim značenjem u zadivljujućem organskom jedinstvu.
sentences.translationEn: Every dot and every stroke carries within it the spirit of a great nation.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْحِفَاظَ عَلَى هَذَا الْإِرْثِ الْفَنِّيِّ هُوَ صَوْنٌ لِلْقِيَمِ الَّتِي صَاغَتِ الْحَضَارَةَ.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje ovog umjetničkog naslijeđa je čuvanje vrijednosti koje su oblikovale civilizaciju.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabs have made the written word an icon of sanctity and sublime human creativity.

sentences.arabic: فَكُلُّ نُقْطَةٍ وَكُلُّ مَدَّةٍ تَحْمِلُ فِي طَيَّاتِهَا رُوحَ أُمَّةٍ عَظِيمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaka tačka i svaki potez nose u sebi duh velikog naroda.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabs have made the written word an icon of sanctity and sublime human creativity.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ جَعَلَ الْعَرَبُ مِنَ الْكَلِمَةِ الْمَكْتُوبَةِ أَيْقُونَةً لِلْقُدْسِيَّةِ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ الْإِنْسَانِيِّ الرَّفِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi su od pisane riječi učinili ikonu svetosti i uzvišenog ljudskog stvaralaštva.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabs have made the written word an icon of sanctity and sublime human creativity.
